mapper.select: SELECT a.activity_id AS activityId, a.title, a.summary, a.content, a.cover_url AS coverUrl, a.location, a.start_time AS startTime, a.end_time AS endTime, a.join_start_time AS joinStartTime, a.join_end_time AS joinEndTime, a.capacity, a.joined_count AS joinedCount, a.status, CASE WHEN #{userId} IS NULL OR #{userId} = '' THEN FALSE WHEN j.join_status = 'JOINED' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS joined, CASE WHEN #{userId} IS NULL OR #{userId} = '' THEN FALSE WHEN j.checkin_status = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS checkedIn FROM group_activity a LEFT JOIN group_activity_join j ON j.activity_id = a.activity_id AND j.user_id = #{userId} WHERE a.activity_id = #{activityId} LIMIT 1

SELECT join_id AS joinId, activity_id AS activityId, user_id AS userId, join_status AS joinStatus, joined_at AS joinedAt, cancelled_at AS cancelledAt, checkin_status AS checkinStatus, checked_in_at AS checkedInAt, college_snapshot AS collegeSnapshot, class_snapshot AS classSnapshot, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM group_activity_join WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_activity_join( join_id, activity_id, user_id, join_status, joined_at, checkin_status, college_snapshot, class_snapshot, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( UUID(), #{activityId}, #{userId}, #{joinStatus}, #{joinedAt}, #{checkinStatus}, #{collegeSnapshot}, #{classSnapshot}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE group_activity_join SET join_status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND join_status = 'JOINED' AND (checkin_status IS NULL OR checkin_status = 0)

UPDATE group_activity_join SET checkin_status = 1, checked_in_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND join_status = 'JOINED' AND (checkin_status IS NULL OR checkin_status = 0)

UPDATE group_activity SET joined_count = joined_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND ( capacity IS NULL OR capacity = 0 OR joined_count < capacity )
UPDATE group_activity SET joined_count = CASE WHEN joined_count > 0 THEN joined_count - 1 ELSE 0 END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.select: SELECT a.activity_id AS activityId, a.title, a.cover_url AS coverUrl, a.location, a.start_time AS startTime, a.end_time AS endTime, j.join_status AS joinStatus, j.checkin_status AS checkinStatus, j.joined_at AS joinedAt, j.checked_in_at AS checkedInAt, j.college_snapshot AS collegeSnapshot, j.class_snapshot AS classSnapshot FROM group_activity_join j JOIN group_activity a ON a.activity_id = j.activity_id WHERE j.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY j.joined_at DESC

SELECT oc.org_name AS collegeName, ok.org_name AS className FROM student_info s LEFT JOIN organization oc ON oc.org_id = s.college_id LEFT JOIN organization ok ON ok.org_id = s.class_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
